result:
## POS Billing Flow — File & Function Map

### Entry Points (Routes)
**`app/Http/routes.php`**
- Line 636: `POST /v1/merchant/{storeID}/order` → `OrderController@postOrd` — **main billing endpoint**
- Line 639: `POST /v1/merchant/{storeID}/dummyOrder` → `OrderController@postDummyOrd`
- Line 642: `POST /v1/merchant/{restId}/globalOrder` → `OrderController@postGlobalOrder`
- Line 690: `POST /v1/merchant/{storeID}/order/update` → `OrderController@updateOrderDetail`
- Line 693: `PUT /v1/merchant/{storeID}/order/cancel` → `OrderController@updateOrd`

### Controller
**`app/Http/Controllers/OrderController.php`**
- `postOrd()` (line 514) — validates store/chain/APK/fiscal year, calls `Order::postOrder()`, dispatches background jobs
- `postGlobalOrder()` (line 2547) — chain-level orders
- `updateOrderDetail()` — post-creation updates
- `updateOrd()` — void/cancel

### Core Model
**`app/Order.php`** (~1.5MB, the heart of billing)
- `postOrder($storeID, $dataArray)` (line 7915) — main orchestrator
- `createOrderSummary()` (line 4724) — builds order header (netBill, grossBill, customer, taxes, discounts)
- `createOrderDetail()` (line 5242) — builds line items (products, variants, modifiers, combos)
- `createPaymentTransactions()` (line 6400) — processes paymentList (CASH, CARD, CREDIT, LOYALTY, VOUCHER, etc.)
- `createOrderAccounting()` (line 4714) — GL entries
- DB transaction block (line ~10798) — atomic insert into `orderSummary`, `chainOrderSummary`, `orderDetail`, `orderPayments`, `orderAccounting`
- `settleOrder()` (line 17083) — payment settlement
- `voidOrderScript()` (line 21078) — void/cancel logic

### Alternative Order Models
- **`app/Order2.php`** (115KB) — legacy/alternate order model
- **`app/OnlineOrder.php`** (490KB) — online/ecom orders
- **`app/mysquareOrder.php`** (153KB) — MySquare integration

### Database Schema
**`cloud_schema/store.sql`**
- `orderSummary` (line ~400) — orderID, invoiceNumber, netBill, grossBill, paymentStatus, deliveryStatus, taxes, discounts, PINumber, posDate
- `orderPayments` (line ~225) — paymentType, amount, transactionID, card/bank fields, tender/change
- `orderDetail` — productID, variantID, quantity, price, modifiers, tax per item
- `orderAccounting` — GL debit/credit entries
- Validation schema: **`app/schema/orderSchema.json`**

### Services
- **`app/Services/InvoiceNumberService.php`** — server-side invoice number generation
- **`app/Services/OrderDeletionService.php`** — order archival
- **`app/Services/OrderSyncFailureService.php`** — sync failure tracking

### Key Background Jobs (dispatched after order save)
| Job | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| `SendOrderReceiptJob` | Email/SMS receipt |
| `StockLedgerJob` | Inventory deduction |
| `QBLoyaltyJob` | Loyalty points |
| `ChainAccountingJob` | Accounting sync |
| `NavisionNewSalesJob` | Navision ERP sync |
| `ZOHOCreateSalesOrderJob` | ZOHO CRM sync |
| `UnicommerceCreateSaleOrderJob` | Unicommerce sync |
| `EasyEcomSaleOrderJob` | EasyEcom sync |
| `PinelabsDigitalInvoiceJob` | Digital invoice |

### Flow Summary
```
POS Device → POST /v1/merchant/{storeID}/order
  → OrderController::postOrd() — validate, check fiscal year
    → Order::postOrder() — inside DB::transaction():
      → createOrderSummary()
      → createOrderDetail()
      → createPaymentTransactions()
      → createOrderAccounting()
      → INSERT into orderSummary, orderDetail, orderPayments, orderAccounting
    → Dispatch Jobs (receipt, stock, loyalty, ERP sync...)
  → Return {orderID, invoiceNumber, status}
```
